roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SENT
APD PC1203,9 TRANSFER OUT MOTION FILED

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYTO SAN MATEO COUNTY/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SANFRANCISCO COUNTY TO SAN MATEO  COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/
/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT & PPRF COMPLIANCE/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT IS ON FORMAL PROBATION SO HIS DPO WILL FILE ANY RESTITUTION RELATED MATTERS AS NEEDED/X:THE DEFENDANT IS NOW PPRF COMPLIANT/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH HIS THERAPY,/X:DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO WITHDRAW HIS GUILTY PLEA ON COUNT 1 AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS REINSTATED,/DISM:1/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 3 D/CTS:3/DNACOMP/IND/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SATERM/X:PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED 05-25-17 IS NOW TERMINATED,/SAORD/SA2: HELEN HAN/SAORD2/SA3:100 DRUMM STREET/SAORD3/WS/WEAP/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/RESTV/PPRF/PPRFRPT:12-11-18//CONTD: RESTITUTION DETERMINATION AND PPRF COMPLIANCE REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOP/BE/

/CAL:PLEA AND STATUS OF PROGRAMS/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THECOMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, PC 646,9(A), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 AND 3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:09-20-18/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/BAIL: 75000/X:BAIL REMAINS THE SAME/SAORD/SA1:HELEN HAN/SA2:100 DRUMMST, SF/SAORD3/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT ATTEMPT TO FIND PROTECTIVE PERSONAND SHALL NOT HAVE ANY WEAPONS/CONTD: PRETRIAL/DOP/
